name: kitchen
description: Recipes, pantry, fridge, freezer, meal planning, and AI-assisted kitchen management
author: Makestack

required.name: inventory-stock
required.description: Stock quantity tracking — kitchen stock is a filtered view of inventory stock

optional.name: costing
optional.description: Per-recipe cost calculation from ingredient prices

optional.name: suppliers
optional.description: Link ingredients to supplier catalogue entries

userdb_tables.name: kitchen_recipes
userdb_tables.description: Recipe records linking catalogue workflows to kitchen metadata

userdb_tables.name: kitchen_recipe_ingredients
userdb_tables.description: Ingredient entries per recipe with quantities and units

userdb_tables.name: kitchen_meal_plan
userdb_tables.description: Weekly meal plans (one record per Monday ISO date)

userdb_tables.name: kitchen_meal_plan_entries
userdb_tables.description: Individual meal slot entries within a meal plan

userdb_tables.name: kitchen_cook_log
userdb_tables.description: Cooking session log with rating and stock deduction flag

userdb_tables.name: kitchen_locations
userdb_tables.description: Location configuration: pantry, fridge, freezer, other

userdb_tables.name: kitchen_stock_aliases
userdb_tables.description: Receipt text to catalogue path mappings for bulk import

userdb_tables.name: kitchen_stock_metadata
userdb_tables.description: Expiry date and frozen-on date per stock item (extends inventory-stock)

api_endpoints.name: list_stock
api_endpoints.description: List kitchen stock items, optionally filtered by location (pantry/fridge/freezer/other)

api_endpoints.name: list_expiring_stock
api_endpoints.description: List stock items expiring within a given number of days (reads kitchen_stock_metadata)

api_endpoints.name: lookup_stock_alias
api_endpoints.description: Look up a catalogue path by receipt text

api_endpoints.name: save_stock_alias
api_endpoints.description: Save a receipt text to catalogue path alias

api_endpoints.name: bulk_update_stock
api_endpoints.description: Batch update stock items from receipt parsing result (proxies inventory-stock)

api_endpoints.name: list_recipes
api_endpoints.description: List recipes with optional filters: cuisine_tag, max_cook_time, search

api_endpoints.name: get_recipe
api_endpoints.description: Full recipe with ingredients, nutrition, and cook log summary

api_endpoints.name: list_can_make
api_endpoints.description: Recipes that can be made from current stock

api_endpoints.name: recipe_stock_check
api_endpoints.description: Stock availability breakdown for a specific recipe

api_endpoints.name: get_recipe_nutrition
api_endpoints.description: Nutrition breakdown per serving for a recipe

api_endpoints.name: set_ingredient_nutrition
api_endpoints.description: Set or update nutritional data for an ingredient

api_endpoints.name: calculate_recipe_nutrition
api_endpoints.description: Recalculate recipe nutrition from stored ingredient data

api_endpoints.name: get_meal_plan
api_endpoints.description: Get or create the meal plan for a week (Monday ISO date)

api_endpoints.name: set_meal_plan_entry
api_endpoints.description: Set a meal slot entry in a weekly plan

api_endpoints.name: get_shopping_list
api_endpoints.description: Required ingredients for the week minus current stock

api_endpoints.name: record_cook_session
api_endpoints.description: Record a cooking session (auto-deducts stock via inventory-stock peer)

api_endpoints.name: list_cook_log
api_endpoints.description: List cooking sessions with optional filters: recipe_id, date range, rating
